programme.title: Half Brothers
programme.desc: Renato, a Mexican aviation exec, is shocked to learn that he has an American half-brother he never knew about: free-spirited Asher. They are forced on a road trip together, tracing the path their father took from Mexico to the U.S.

programme.title: Hoarders S13 - EP 3

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 5
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 4
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

Find out if Joakim manages to keep within the S600 budget!

programme.title: Scene City: Blender Mak
programme.desc: Blender Mak unfolds in a 1960s Singaporean kampong, focusing on Puan Timah, a modern Malay woman with the only blender in the village. Ramadan prompts her to showcase the blender, sparking clashes with traditional values. Simultaneously, Kwan You faces business challenges amid declining health. As the grand iftar approaches, Timah's reliance on the blender clashes with the kampong's values.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When part of the team falls ill after becoming targets of a sinister plot, it becomes an all-hands-on-deck situation to save them before it's too late. Meanwhile, Watson announces a new ambitious project that he has been working on, in this two-part season finale.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 19
programme.desc: Zhi Ming was about to search for the homeless man when Guo Ying finds him. Guo Ying accompanies him, and the two find the homeless man. They finally claim the necklace pendant from him, but Guo Ying suddenly attacks Zhi Ming and snatches it away. Although Zhi Ming had the chance to get the pendant back, he did not want to hurt Guo Ying. Guo Ying takes the chance and escapes with the pendant.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 20
programme.desc: Guo Ying is kidnapped, Zhi Ming and Yu Xuan also fall prey to assassins. When Zhi Ming wakes up, he realises Guo Ying and Yu Xuan are tied up, and Mary has a ticking time bomb attached to her. Mary tells him Lao Ying is angry because Zhi Ming refuses to obey to him. Zhi Ming is asked to choose between killing Guo Ying and Yu Xuan, or have the time bomb on Mary explode. What will Zhi Ming do?

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 3
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 25
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

Done with this mission, the trio find themselves assigned with Mission Impossible. Chris falls ill. As she reminisces the days of being cared for by Mary, Mary appears. Her odd behaviour soon draws the trio’s suspicion.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 46
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Determined, Zhi-en searches everywhere for the designer she wants for the upcoming project. Along the way, she encounters a mysterious man multiple times.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 9
programme.desc: In this episode, Si Xiao Fu visit Dulan Nation in Taitung - a place as fun and captivating as a man-made theme park, leaving visitors wanting more. Together with the village chief and friends from Dulan Nation, they continue to explore Taitung’s mountains and seas. Though remote and little-known, this hidden gem is rich in fresh ingredients and delicious cuisine, making it a top summer travel destination for visitors.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 7
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan finds out that Yunzhen has been picking Yaling up from her kindergarten from time to time.

Pursued by a detective, he is sent back in time, where he seeks to set things right and discovers love along the way.

Arya then approaches Dinda and offers a deal that he thinks is very profitable.

programme.title: Saya Kan Cuma Ikan, Mana Saya Tau Isi Hatimu
programme.desc: Adit (Ridwan Ghany) is a spoiled child who always relies on his father for money. One day, his father goes bankrupt and he wants to open a catfish restaurant with his friend. However, because Adit doesn't like catfish, Nuri (Syahnaz Sadiqah) and Babe Rojak have to be extra patient in teaching Adit how to cultivate catfish.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 10
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Satu Mimpi Beda Profesi Satu Cinta
programme.desc: The life of a beautiful girl named Ines (Esta Pramanita). To make ends meet, Ines works as a traveling dangdut singer.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) refuses to accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea told him that Bryan's travel business was a scam. Because of Dhea, Bryan suffered losses and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work at Bryan's travel business for two weeks.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 10
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 46
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: 34 Hari Nyender di Hati Ketua Khapunkhap
programme.desc: Jirayut travels to Indonesia to find the mother who left him as a child. He meets Halda, a ketoprak vendor who offers to help. However, Halda secretly plots to hire a 'fake mother' to secure a share of the inheritance left by Jirayut’s father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 195
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bukan Preman Bener Tapi Beneran Preman
programme.desc: Aldo (Ridho Illahi), a local thug, tries to sneak into a haunted house without paying, sparking a war of words with the feisty Qia (Indah Nicole). After his girlfriend dumps him for his criminal lifestyle, Aldo finds himself drawn to Qia, even as his own father plots to shut down the night market entirely.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 649
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 143
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Independence and transparency!

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes - EP 3
programme.desc: From Burgundy to the Charente-Maritime, from Mont-Saint-Michel to the Chateau de Rambouillet, ''guardian angels'' work to restore French national heritage. Who are these craftsmen and women, committed to renovating the country's finest monuments and how do they organise their projects, work that is sometimes on a titanic scale?

programme.desc: With colossal investments, Americans and Chinese are vying for supremacy in the field of artificial intelligence. programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Chateau de Sully-sur-Loire, once a watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it was probably used by soldiers. Historical research continues to uncover its mysteries.

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 15
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an antique shop in Yvelines. Then, she meets Manon in her workshop in Eure-et-Loir.

programme.title: Littoral - EP 17
programme.desc: They are invisible but essential: the dockworkers moor and undock all the merchant ships that enter and leave the ports. Sailors on land, they live on the watch, just like on a ship. In an increasingly automated world, they are an essential link in global maritime trade.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 12
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: La Cabane a Histoires - EP 1
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: La Cabane a Histoires - EP 2
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 18
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 18
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 38
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Mambar Pierrette
programme.desc: In Douala, in a poor district in the city, the everyday life of Pierrette, a seamstress who takes care of her two children and invalid mother alone. Bravely determined and discrete, she is used to getting by from day-to-day but never gives up.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 1
programme.desc: As President Hamelin takes part in the unveiling of a commemorative bust, he realises that he has still done nothing for Quebec that could be called ''great''. He tasks Karine and Councillor Arsenault with finding him a project that will go down in history.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 2
programme.desc: The country is submerged by a vast power cut! In an emergency meeting, Harvey and Robillard, CEO of Hydro Quebec, lie to the president about the real cause of the problem. Stephane and Major Zephir continue their investigation into the terrorist threat to the university.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 3
programme.desc: Electricity outages are increasingly intense and increasingly frequent throughout Quebec. Harvey has no choice but to explain the reality of the situation to Hamelin. The terrorist threat still hangs over both the university and Gabrielle.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 4
programme.desc: Because the USA depends largely on Quebec for its electricity, American President RIchards demands that Hamelin resolves the power outages, threatening to cut Quebec off economically if he doesn't. It's consternation all round...

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 29
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: ama Gloria
programme.desc: Six-year-old Cleo lives with her kind, but often absent father, and her nanny Gloria, who she loves. But Gloria has to definitively return to Cap Verde to look after her children. The separation is brutal and Cleo is crushed. Her father sends her to spend the summer with Gloria.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Abracada Bar
programme.desc: A timid young filmmaker, an overbearing producer and two actors competing in false modesty. At the Red Carpet Film Festival, all masks will fall during the presentation of a surprise acting award.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Capharnaumia
programme.desc: A director in love with his actress catches her with someone else. Out of revenge, he cuts all her scenes from the film. The producer finds out and does everything to recover the original version.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 3
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 4
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Movie - Naaigal Jaakirathai
programme.desc: Karthick Chinnamalai, a cop, takes the help of a trained military dog for his assistance in finding out the whereabouts of his wife Renuka, who has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Movie - Vasool Raja MBBS
programme.desc: A goon, Rajaram, enrols himself in a medical college to fulfil his father's dream. He defies the college rules and creates problems for Dr Vishwanathan.

programme.title: Movie - Inimai Idho Idho
programme.desc: Inimai Idho Idho is a 1983 Indian Tamil-language film directed by R. Ramalingam, starring Chandrasekhar, Nisha Noor and Rajendra Prasad.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Innisai Mazhai
programme.desc: Michael and Saravanan love Mamta though she loves Vijay. However, Vijay, who is brought up by a single father, hates the idea of love and rejects Mamta.

programme.title: Movie - Thambikku Intha Ooru
programme.desc: Akil, a rich youth, runs a restaurant in partnership with his friend Cola Kumar in Singapore. One day, he discovers that he is an orphan and thus embarks on a journey to find his biological parents.

programme.title: Movie - Deiva Thirumagal
programme.desc: Krishna, a man with an intellectual disability, fights for the custody of his young daughter Nila. He convinces lawyer Anuradha to fight his case when his father-in-law takes his daughter away from him.

programme.title: Movie - Joot Are You Ready
programme.desc: Easwaran, a man from a small village, moves to his brother's house in Chennai with his ailing father. However, his life turns upside down when his brother incurs the wrath of a local thug.

programme.title: Movie - Thillalangadi
programme.desc: Nisha leaves Krishna because of his easy-going attitude towards his life and career. Soon, her parents arrange her marriage with an NRI and she reluctantly agrees, but things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Movie - Kuthu
programme.desc: Veerabhagu, a powerful don, disapproves of his daughter Anjali's relationship with Guru. He tries several ways to keep them away from each other.

programme.title: Movie - Ithu Engal Rajyam
programme.desc: This movie stars Rajesh and Jeevitha, and is directed by Madhu.

programme.title: Movie - Jayam (Old)
programme.desc: A Tamil film staring Sangita and Mansoor Ali Khan.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Padhavi Pramanam
programme.desc: A convict escapes from jail and vows to kill a politician who betrayed him. When the latter is about to take oath as the state's chief minister, the convict hatches a plan to kidnap him.

programme.title: Movie - Paarvai Ondre Pothume
programme.desc: Manoj becomes a successful hotelier through his hard work and helps his best friend, Vinod, by giving him a job. Their friendship is put to the test when both of them fall in love with Neetha.

programme.title: Movie - Mahanadhi
programme.desc: Krishnaswamy, an honest man, is conned into a chit fund business and imprisoned. While he faces unspeakable hardships in prison, his family disintegrates.

programme.title: Movie - Little John
programme.desc: To please his girlfriend's parents, John seeks the help of a god-man to make him invisible but unfortunately, he shrinks in size. However, to return to his normal state, he must procure a magic ring.

programme.title: Movie - Kushi
programme.desc: College friends Jenny and Shiva part ways due to a misunderstanding. Despite being in love and realising that they cannot live without each other, their egos prevent them from uniting.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Final (Live)
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Rome, Italy, at the historic Foro Italico. The tournament was first held in 1930 and moved to its current home in Rome in 1935.

programme.title: ATP Originals Series The Ring Master: Alexander Bublik
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Dallas Open
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the Ford Center at The Star, Dallas.

programme.title: TSINGTAO Badminton Asia Team C'ships 2026 D1 Morning Session: China vs Malaysia
programme.desc: The TSINGTAO Badminton Asia Team Championships 2026 is the 6th edition of the premier Asian badminton team event, held in Qingdao, China, crowning Asia's top men's and women's teams competing in singles and doubles formats for continental glory.

programme.title: World Snooker C'ship 2026 Day 16 Afternoon Session: Final (8)
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 H/Ls Mutua Madrid Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Manzanares Park.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually at the Foro Italico in Rome, Italy. Since its inception in 1930, the Italian Open has become one of the most prestigious clay-court tournaments in the world.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Rome, Italy, at the historic Foro Italico. The tournament was first held in 1930 and moved to its current home in Rome in 1935.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 bitpanda Hamburg Open (500) Day 1 Round 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The Bitpanda Hamburg Open is an annual professional men's tennis tournament held at the Am Rothenbaum Tennis Center in Hamburg, Germany. Established in 1892, it is one of the oldest and most traditional tennis tournaments in the world.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 bitpanda Hamburg Open (500) Day 2 Round 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The Bitpanda Hamburg Open is an annual professional men's tennis tournament held at the Am Rothenbaum Tennis Center in Hamburg, Germany. Established in 1892, it is one of the oldest and most traditional tennis tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Tie Break Tens 2026 Indian Wells
programme.desc: Tie Break Tens is a fast-paced, knockout tennis format featuring exclusively 10-point tiebreak matches with no games or sets. The first player to reach 10 points with a two-point advantage wins the match. Introduced in 2015, it is a short-format tennis partner of the ITF often featuring top professional players

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Antonio Margarito vs. Paul Williams
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBO welterweight championship bout between 8-time defending champ Antonio Margarito, aka 'El Tornado de Tijuana' (34-4, 24 KOs) and undefeated Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (32-0, 24 KOs) from the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on July 14, 2007.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 100
programme.desc: When the lights go out in Home Dome, the Teletubbies get the giggles! The lights come back on again and there's Tubby Custard mess everywhere.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing the Best Friend Song with their school friends.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 6
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 7
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it's making her speed around town out of control. It's up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses a remote control to drive the Tato Team to the far side of the supermarket. Can they return and save the fruit and veggie aisle?

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 6

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 7

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 29

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 31
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: Play On S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Paul Kennedy meets the Qasimi family, who are Hazaras who escaped a suicide bombing in Pakistan before finding refuge in Australia - and football. Plus the Puoch family, a Sudanese family who live and breathe basketball.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: The 1980s swept in a new professional era for international cricket players. This episode highlights the blow-ups and the great head-to-head clashes that had crowds on their feet and fans yelling at their screens.

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 14
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders (2026) - EP 16
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel bring you all the washup from the Federal Budget, breaking down the policies and the politics, the reaction of the Opposition, crossbench and Senate plus how voters and the public have responded.

programme.title: Offsiders (2026) - EP 15
programme.desc: Offsiders is hitting the road and heading north to the Sunshine State for the NRL's Magic Round. Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover all the action from rugby league's big showpiece round in Brisbane.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 98
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 98
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 98
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 98
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: The Matter Of Facts S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Are you being fooled by disinformation? Hamish Macdonald examines that question as he meets with a range of participants, tech experts, nerds and disruptors to discover what's happening to our brains and belief systems.

programme.title: The Way We Wore S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: In this final episode, Celeste Barber tracks the ascent of Australia's fashion sector, tracing its roots from early bespoke seamstresses to the multi-billion-dollar international enterprise it is today.

programme.title: Art Works S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Namila's at Melbourne's NGV International; singer-songwriter Jen Cloher discusses their new album; cultural objects return to lutruwita for an important new exhibition at TMAG; and a performance by slam-poet Thabani Tshuma.

programme.title: End Game with Tony Armstrong S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong, the former AFL player turned award-winning broadcaster travels to the UK, as he starts a global search for solutions that could help drive systemic change back home.

programme.title: Alone Australia S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Food is in extraordinary abundance for some survivalists, while others struggle with empty bellies and question their future in the competition.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026) - EP 98
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice S1 - EP 29
programme.desc: Author and documentarian John Safran shines a light on a Jewish staple, while Alice tries to change his mind on cauliflower.

programme.title: If You're Listening - Black Swans (2026) - EP 1
programme.desc: For years, many feared our planet would be stripped by the weight of a colossal population. In 2026 we've found ourselves in a world where we're not scared about having too many babies, but too few. So what happened?

programme.title: ABC National News (2026) - EP 138
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 (2026) - EP 77

programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 1

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 3

programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 5

programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sauteed greens.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: Rachael makes a smoky, Asian-inspired barbecue sauce to slather over sockeye salmon, cooked with crispy breadcrumbs and green onions and served with white basmati rice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 31
programme.desc: Nine contestants battle it out for immunity as Patissier of pain, Adriano Zumbo sets a challenge that puts a new twist on a classic pressure test.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 2
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S3) - EP 67
programme.desc: In this episode Rachael's in party mode and she's firing up popcorn with popcorn chicken. If you like those both super-spicy, you've come to the right place at the right time.

programme.title: A Boyfriend To Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that will change the young couple's lives forever.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 2
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 5

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 5
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 32
programme.desc: The cooks battle it out in twins challenge. Each team must utilize an appliance in their 90 minute dessert cook, aiming for identical dishes, despite only being able to shout instructions at each other.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 14

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 6

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 13

programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: Crashbox S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: During a trip to the Lake of the Ozarks, Ben and Gwen squabble over Ben's 'half-birthday' celebration, but when Max gets word of a suspicious rockslide, the cousins must put aside their differences.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 23
programme.desc: Left to entertain himself as Max takes a well-deserved nap, Ben stumbles upon a Xingo arcade game and goes OE-Shock Rock to power it up, but it, unfortunately, receives too much juice.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 24
programme.desc: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. When the Bounty Hunters appear and corner Ben, Gwen must use what she learnt to help him escape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: As Max attempts to get Ben and Gwen to the Four Corners Monument before sunset, an ominous fog bank engulfs the roadway and forces Max to drive at a snail's pace.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien-antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream. She is soon confronted by Charmcaster.

programme.title: Chowder S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Shnitzel is tired of adult jobs, and decides to act like a kid again.

programme.desc: When the gang caters an important sporting event, Mung and Truffles are at odds.

programme.title: Chowder S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: Chowder gets trapped in a block of ice when his brain freezes.

programme.title: Chowder S2 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Mung replaces their old snail car with a new one, Chowder can't handle the loss

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1 - EP 17

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Natsui Itsuki's Haiku Trip! "Kumamoto Prefecture" Part 1
programme.desc: Haiku poet Natsui Itsuki sets "Haiku Post" across Japan, and receives "your piece of Haiku"! She selects unique works from among them, and invites the authors of those haiku to share their intentions, memories, and life stories. ROLAND, the King of the Hosts, accompanies her as a partner on the trip.

programme.title: Hidden Japan "Iriomote: The Life-Weaving Island"
programme.desc: Japan’s natural beauty is astonishing in its richness - from the sea to the_x000D_mountains, from deep valleys to tranquil lakes. How were the breathtaking_x000D_landscapes that captivate us created? Now, it’s time to set out on a journey to_x000D_uncover the secrets hidden deep within the earth.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: SCIENCE ZERO
programme.desc: A scientific information program which explains the latest research, disasters and accidents from scientific aspects with a virtual set in the studio.

programme.title: Fish Masters
programme.desc: A variety program exploring the mysterious world of fish with the fish expert Sakana-kun.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 19 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga hands over the clan to his son Nobutada (Koseki Yuta) and begins building a grand castle in Azuchi with his sights set on unifying the realm. Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)’s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE (R)
programme.desc: Let’s look into the world of Ukiyoe to learn how people lived in Edo period!

programme.title: Hello! NHK WORLD-JAPAN
programme.desc: Showcasing various programs and activities of NHK WORLD-JAPAN which provides the latest information on Japan and Asia to the global audience.

programme.title: News: Good Morning, Japan

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 36
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings "A World-renowned Luxury Sleeper Train
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the "Lost Era" following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: Natural Grandeur of the East (R)
programme.desc: Enjoy the Japanese natural beauties and the many creatures which habitat there and discover the irreplaceable importance of nature.

programme.title: Drama 10 "Mojiko Tenderness Brothers" Ep. 3 (R)
programme.desc: Set at a convenience store in Mojiko, Kitakyushu, this story follows an unlikely pair: a strikingly handsome manager and a wild, enigmatic man who seems able to handle anything. Together, they take on impossible problems, unfolding a tale filled with humor, mystery, and heartfelt human drama.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 99
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1652
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Chic Cities - EP 856
programme.desc: Covering consumer shopping information, trendy specialty stores, travel guides, and the LOHAS propositions of trendy people.

programme.title: Taiwan Criminal Files - EP 1447
programme.desc: Discuss the difficult inside story behind the news events, lead the audience to explore the development of the event from an objective perspective, and strive to enlighten the audience's new thinking.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 629
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 630
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: Eyeshot To The Cross-Strait - EP 810
programme.desc: Discussion on cross-strait issues include: Taiwanese investment, transformation and upgrading, future trends, environmental protection and green energy, cultural and creative consumption, cultural customs, enterprise development, future potential, development trends of cross-strait film and television cooperation

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 81
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 497
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1965
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 697
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 40
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.desc: News Treasury takes everyone to uncover news from the treasure house. In addition to past specials, live broadcasts and reports, there are also precious clips from iconic events that have never been exposed.

programme.title: Super Trio Returns
programme.desc: The Super Trio Series is celebrating its 25th anniversary, and "Super Trio Master" Eric Tsang announces the show's triumphant return! Each episode will feature a host of hilarious guest friends, participating in numerous laugh-out-loud games to deliver endless entertainment.

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Star Weekly
programme.desc: Star Weekly invites celebrities and well-known figures from different sectors to chat with our hosts, sharing their latest work plans and discussing special topics related to films, television and concerts, focusing especially on people and events that online users are keenly following.

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Our food anchors and hosts stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. The hosts personally sample the food and provide honest reviews to keep you informed about delicious and affordable dining options.

programme.title: Cantopop At 50
programme.desc: Cantopop At 50 invites original singers or established singers to reinterpret popular classics that span multiple generations, bringing high-quality music for the fans' enjoyment.

programme.title: Finance Magazine 2026

programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong and Global View
programme.desc: Good Morning Hong Kong brings you the latest news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs that matter to you.

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 29
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2808
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: This children's programme encourages children to ask questions, express themselves, and move towards their goals!

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 1

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2809
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 35
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 15

programme.title: Honour - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.desc: The news of yet another death leaves Pan-ho shaken. Scared for his life, Lee Cheong-gang hands over important evidence to Detective Jang.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 16
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] To deal with mass resignations at Zodiac, Wing-sing earnestly offers support. During the investigation, Yi-ka finds out Tak-kiu already knows that particular investor is dodgy and keeps her in the dark.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 17
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2213
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 885
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sing manages to stay alive as Yui-fai donates a kidney to him, but his health has deteriorated. A male skull is found on a hillside beside Zodiac HK Hospital. The deceased is Chiu Ting-kwok, whom Yat-yin has been looking for. Yi-ka leads a task force to look into the issue of taking kickbacks from contractors.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 33
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2213
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 6
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 7
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 17
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 19
programme.desc: Hei-sun, who has mobility issues, no longer wants to be a burden on Moon-yuet. She endures the pain and practices walking. While livestreaming goods delivery, Man-sing is smeared. She also loses her TV job. Man-sing earnestly dissuades Moon-yuet from seeking revenge. But Hei-sun roots for Moon-yuet.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 886
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 18

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Tak-kiu asks someone to gain understanding of the Chiu Ting-kwok murder case. Kam-wing’s safe astonishing contains Chiu Ting-Kwok’s staff card! Tak-kiu approaches Kam-wing and asks him something. The duo unhappily goes their separate ways. Kam-wing is arrested by the police on suspicion of murdering Chiu Ting-kwok, and he takes the blame for everything.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 34
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2214
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 2
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 886
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 6
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 10
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 10
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 11
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 33
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.
